title: Phunware Inc (PHUN) Q2 2024 Earnings Highlights
text: Phunware Inc (PHUN) reported Q2 2024 earnings highlights. Q2 2024 revenue reached $1 million, up nearly 10% from Q1. Six-month revenue totaled $1.9 million, down 26.8% year-over-year. Q2 gross profit: $470,000. Net loss for Q2: $2.6 million ($0.32 per share). Operating expenses fell 48.6% in Q2 to $3.4 million. Cash position: $20.4 million (June 30), plus $16.2 million from July ATM sales. The company achieved 100% customer retention in the second quarter of 2024, demonstrating strong loyalty. Most impressively, software bookings surged 623% in Q2 and 939% for the six-month period versus 2023. The firm exceeded its customer bookings for the entire year of 2023 within the first half of 2024, and gained inclusion in the FTSE Russell Microcap Index. Revenue declines persist, and the company faces conversion challenges converting bookings into actual revenue, with implementation cycles spanning 30-45 days.
